Download and Web Service Updates and Additions

Since last GICC meeting

Website: data.nconemap.gov

• Transferred superseded GIS data to DCR/Archives (1+ GB) • Since GEOMAPP, total transferred: 14+ GB • Cadastral Data for All 100 Counties • Available as Esri map service, Esri feature service, WMS, WFS, and download

NC OneMap Accomplishments

Website: data.nconemap.gov

3

If you use:

www.nconemap (.com, .net, or .org)

services.nconemap (.com, .net, or .org)

data.nconemap (.com, .net, or .org)

Change your links, bookmarks, web application, and ArcGIS connections to use:

www.nconemap.gov

services.nconemap.gov

data.nconemap.gov
